title: tragacantha lycioides
intro: Tragacantha lycioides, also known as the goat's thorn or goat's thistle, is a plant species within the pea family that is commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic qualities, which are derived from its roots, leaves, and seeds. The health benefits of Tragacantha lycioides include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
